# World Cup Knockout 2026

> Real-time bracket and results tracker for the 2026 FIFA World Cup

## About

World Cup Knockout (worldcupknockout.football) is a live interactive canvas showing all 104 matches, 12 groups, and the complete knockout bracket for the 2026 FIFA World Cup, hosted across Canada, Mexico, and the USA (June–July 2026).

## Content

- Live and final match scores, updated every 60 seconds
- Group standings with points, goal difference, and qualification status
- Full knockout bracket: Round of 32 → Round of 16 → Quarter-finals → Semi-finals → Final
- Match events: goals, yellow cards, and red cards with player names and minute
- Kickoff times in the viewer's local timezone
- 48 group-stage matches across 12 groups (A–L)
- 56 knockout matches including Third Place play-off
- Schedule corrections applied automatically when kickoff times change

## Teams & Groups

32 nations across 12 groups. Host nations: Canada (Group F), Mexico (Group A), USA (Group C).

## Data

Scores sourced from football-data.org (per-match detail endpoint) and ESPN public scoreboard. Schedule from official FIFA 2026 fixture list. Finished results are persisted server-side so they survive upstream outages.

## Winner Odds & Predictions

- [Who is likely to win the World Cup 2026?](https://worldcupknockout.football/world-cup-2026-winner/): Live bookmaker odds (median, de-vigged) and Monte Carlo bracket model predictions, updated every 6 hours. Raw JSON: https://worldcupknockout.football/api/odds

## Winner Odds & Predictions

- [Who is likely to win the World Cup 2026?](https://worldcupknockout.football/world-cup-2026-winner/): Live bookmaker odds (median, de-vigged) and Monte Carlo bracket model predictions, updated every 6 hours. Raw JSON: https://worldcupknockout.football/api/odds

## Winner Odds & Predictions

- [Who is likely to win the World Cup 2026?](https://worldcupknockout.football/world-cup-2026-winner/): Live bookmaker odds (median, de-vigged) and Monte Carlo bracket model predictions, updated every 6 hours. Raw JSON: https://worldcupknockout.football/api/odds

## Route Guides

Projected knockout routes (Round of 32 → Final) for leading contenders, with dates, host cities and likely opponents:

- [England’s route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/england-world-cup-2026-route/): Group L knockout path
- [France’s route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/france-world-cup-2026-route/): Group I knockout path
- [Spain’s route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/spain-world-cup-2026-route/): Group H knockout path
- [Portugal’s route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/portugal-world-cup-2026-route/): Group K knockout path
- [Brazil’s route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/brazil-world-cup-2026-route/): Group C knockout path
- [Argentina’s route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/argentina-world-cup-2026-route/): Group J knockout path
- [Germany’s route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/germany-world-cup-2026-route/): Group E knockout path
- [Netherlands’ route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/netherlands-world-cup-2026-route/): Group F knockout path
- [United States’ route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/united-states-world-cup-2026-route/): Group D knockout path
- [Scotland’s route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/scotland-world-cup-2026-route/): Group C knockout path
- [Australia’s route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/australia-world-cup-2026-route/): Group D knockout path
- [Croatia’s route to the final](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/croatia-world-cup-2026-route/): Group L knockout path
- [All route guides](https://worldcupknockout.football/guides/)

## Winner Odds & Predictions

- [Who is likely to win the World Cup 2026?](https://worldcupknockout.football/world-cup-2026-winner/): Live bookmaker odds (median, de-vigged) and Monte Carlo bracket model predictions, updated every 6 hours. Raw JSON: https://worldcupknockout.football/api/odds

## Usage

Public read-only tracker. No user accounts. Anonymous page-view analytics only.
